'''zhabuju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:osiery|osiery]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-b-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:osiery|osiery]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhabuju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæbijith|zhæbijith]] || [[word:zhæbijij|zhæbijij]] || [[word:zhæbijish|zhæbijish]] || [[word:zhæbiji|zhæbiji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhabubujuth|zhabubujuth]] || [[word:zhabubujuj|zhabubujuj]] || [[word:zhabubujush|zhabubujush]] || [[word:zhabubuju|zhabubuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhabujuth|zhabujuth]] || [[word:zhabujuj|zhabujuj]] || [[word:zhabujush|zhabujush]] || [[word:zhabuju|zhabuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhabufjuth|zhabufjuth]] || [[word:zhabufjuj|zhabufjuj]] || [[word:zhabufjush|zhabufjush]] || [[word:zhabufjuf|zhabufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhabujuthu|zhabujuthu]] || [[word:zhabujuju|zhabujuju]] || [[word:zhabujushu|zhabujushu]] || [[word:zhabujuku|zhabujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhabujuth|zhabujuth]] || [[word:zhabujuj|zhabujuj]] || [[word:zhabujush|zhabujush]] || [[word:zhabuju|zhabuju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhabujuthul|zhabujuthul]] || [[word:zhabujujul|zhabujujul]] || [[word:zhabujushul|zhabujushul]] || [[word:zhabujukul|zhabujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhabujuthuthu|zhabujuthuthu]] || [[word:zhabujujuju|zhabujujuju]] || [[word:zhabujushushu|zhabujushushu]] || [[word:zhabujuku|zhabujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhabujuthun|zhabujuthun]] || [[word:zhabujujun|zhabujujun]] || [[word:zhabujushun|zhabujushun]] || [[word:zhabujukun|zhabujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhabujuthuoro|zhabujuthuoro]] || [[word:zhabujujuoro|zhabujujuoro]] || [[word:zhabujushuoro|zhabujushuoro]] || [[word:zhabujukuoro|zhabujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
